profile_bio.description: サイエンスライター。宇宙ニュース各種取り扱っております。ロケット・宇宙機、惑星科学から宇宙ビジネスに政策、イベント情報まで。電子書籍『「はやぶさ」7年60億kmのミッション完全解説』、初訳書に『ロケットガールの誕生 コンピューターになった女性たち』。2023年4月より文部科学省 宇宙開発利用部会臨時委員（第12期）。

value.string_value: 世界のロケット市場は､国家主導型の宇宙探査や政府系衛星の打ち上げ向けに開発され､商用衛星の民間需要を取り込みながら発展してきた。2000年代前半まで民間需要といえば大型静止通信衛星の打ち上げが中心だったが､現在は小型衛星による通信･地球観測･測位のための衛星コンステレーションへと拡大しつつある。世界のロケットビジネスを､その性質や用途による分類を手がかりに概観してみよう。
世界のロケットビジネスは群雄割拠の時代へ／続々と登場する｢再使用ロケット｣が宇宙ビジネスを変革する

kept.text:
$RKLB - Nice bounce off the 50 day MA yesterday on short-term profit taking.

Chart still looks primed to hit new all-time highs as the company is benefiting from "tightening launch capacity" resulting in a roughly 10% annual launch price hike over the next 5 years.

SpaceX raised dedicated Falcon 9 pricing to $74M from $70M in late February while rideshare rates moved to $7,000/kg from $6,000/kg.

kept.text:
$RKLB +5.8% 🟢
Amazon’un Uydu İştahı Tedarikçileri Ateşledi

Herkes Amazon'un doğrudan cihaza (D2D) bağlantı için açıkladığı devasa talebi konuşuyor. Ancak piyasanın burada asıl fiyatladığı detay çok daha farklı.

Meselenin özü aslında şu ki, binlerce uyduluk LEO ağları yörüngeye kendi kendine oturmuyor. Amazon'un uzay pazarındaki bu boğa iştahı, fırlatma hizmetleri sunan Rocket Lab hisselerine anında değer kazandırdı.

Altına hücum döneminde asıl parayı kazma kürek satanlar kazanır. Uzay ekosistemi büyüdükçe, altyapı tedarikçileri yatırımcılar için en rasyonel fırsatı sunmaya devam edecek. 🚀

kept.text:
$RKLB: Got the gap fill and retest of the closest zone of support (green rectangle).

RSI and MACD have flipped negative relative to their MA and signal line, respectively, which usually represents a sell signal.

However, given that the weekly chart shows these indicators as positive and we have a dragonfly doji candle for the week, I'd say it looks like more upside is in store rather than a return to the downtrend.

This was just a standard pullback after an initial run, IMO, and we're still on track for crossing above $100 sometime this month.

GLTA and NFA...

profile_bio.description: PhD Engineer and former research fellow at MIT. Growth investor primarily interested in $RKLB, $ASTS, $QS, & $ETH but also $ANGX, $OPEN, & $ORGN. Posts are NFA.

quoted_tweet.text:
$RKLB: Nice bounce off the 20 sma in the zone of support after losing the 21 ema. 

If this holds, then we could still see my prediction play out for later this summer (i.e., yellow arrows).

That said, RSI is well below its MA now and MACD is about to exhibit a bearish crossover. 

Both of these signals should provide caution in loading heavy here as they typically indicate a bearish trend, albeit usually short-lived thereafter.

If interested in adding RKLB, then starting to DCA in at these levels is not a bad strategy. 

However, lower prices are likely ahead, IMO, so choose your own adventure!

GLTA and NFA...

tweet.text:
Space theme - $RKLB $BKSY $LUNR $FLY

As I keep saying - don’t rely on a single metric to make decisions

Many assumed losing the 21 EMA meant the trend was over

What matters: are they holding VWAP? Are they respecting the daily/weekly trend?

$RKLB held VWAP from ATHs
$BKSY fakeout → held VWAP from recent lows
$LUNR $FLY showing similar behavior

Zoom out, identify the trend, size accordingly, and sit tight

tweet.text:
Space Update After Big Day on Thursday
$ASTS $RDW $LUNR $RKLB 

$ASTS recently came down for a perfect touch of the broadening wedge bottom at $67.50, which is something I said to watch out for after the BB7 failure. Now it is fighting to regain the 200SMA and closed just above it yesterday. The next major resistance above is $81. Technically in a short-term downtrend, needs a few days of strong price action to reverse the trend. 

$RDW is also looking to reclaim the 200SMA here, after the recent pullback saw the Daily Stoch RSI reset fully to 0. The trend is only just holding here, so we need to see price push back to the key structural level of $9.75, which would see it reclaim the EMAs too. To the downside, $8.65 is the major support level. 

$LUNR remains in an uptrend and saw a recent pullback to the previous resistance trendline which I had been sharing since late 2025, before a perfect bounce. On Wednesday we saw a big hammer candle as price held the EMA20 during the pullback, and is back above the key structural level of $24.95. Thursday was a doji as investors decide if the pullback is over, or if there is a deeper retracement. Crucial end to the week. 

$RKLB also held the EMA20 during the recent pullback, just like $LUNR. However, it actually pulled back to the EMA50 for a perfect bounce, and then regained its key structural level ($78.50) yesterday with a lot more conviction. Looking for a higher close today and strong close to the week.

In exactly 1 year, I’m going to be the first millionaire among my brothers.

And when they ask how I did it, I’ll tell them the truth.

I bought what the norm wasn’t talking about.

$IREN — AI power infrastructure at $19
$NBIS — European AI compute at $85
$RKLB — the SpaceX alternative at $67
$ONDS — autonomous defense at $9
$AAOI — optical networking at $90
$CIFR — AI infrastructure at $14
$AMPX — next-gen battery tech at $13
$OUST — eyes of AI at $20
$ONDS — eyes of the sky at $8

They’ll say I got lucky.

I’ll say I just paid attention.

While they were watching Netflix, I was studying SEC filings.

While they were complaining about their job, I was building on the side, buying the dip.

The information was public. The opportunity was real.

The only thing required was conviction.

See you in a year in Italy…

-BP
